Information for Tenderer/Consultant :

Eligibility of Tenderer :

The Tenderer shall submit documentary evidence demonstrating that it:
is a legally established entity with a valid Trade License, TIN, BIN/VAT Registration Certificate, and other applicable statutory documents;
is financially sound, supported by a Bank Solvency Certificate and Bank Statement for the last three (3) months issued by a scheduled bank, and is not insolvent, bankrupt, or under receivership;
has the technical capability and relevant experience to supply the specified goods and related services in accordance with the RFQ requirements;
is not debarred, suspended, or declared ineligible by the Government of Bangladesh or any applicable Development Partner; and
complies with all other eligibility requirements specified in the RFQ Document.
